rounds.description: Sentinel takeover: master stalled mid-scaffold with Neon Peg code. Rewrote entire game as gravity well puzzle: 20 campaign levels, inverse-square gravity physics, star collection, black holes, portals, 14 PanelUI panels, 40 achievements, 8 game modes, 8 ball skins, 5 themes, procedural audio, particle effects. Initial deploy to gh-pages.
features: Star collection and black hole hazards
8 game modes: campaign, quickplay, timed, zen, speedrun, mirror, randomizer, endless

rounds.description: Continuation: Fixed achvlist panel rename (achlist → achvlist), added 2 new panels (levelselect, wellpicker), verified all 16 panels compile, TypeScript zero errors, vite build clean. Redeployed to gh-pages. IWSDK dev tools (screenshot/logs/ecs) return empty due to commandReady:false — code quality verified via tsc and vite build.
features: Added wellpicker panel (gravity well placement UI)

rounds.description: Critical bug fix: rewrote all 16 uikitml panels to fix ID mismatches (panels inherited wrong IDs from Neon Peg scaffold, so all buttons/labels were unwired). Added 10 new campaign levels (21-30) with advanced obstacles. Added undo well feature (UI button + Z key). Added particle speed cap. Fixed gameover/stats/skins/help content to match gravity well theme. Updated level select to 3 pages.
features: Fixed all 16 panel ID mismatches (critical: buttons were completely unwired)
Rewrote modes panel with correct 8 game mode IDs
Rewrote HUD with correct field IDs (hud-score, hud-wells, etc.)
Rewrote gameover with correct IDs and gravity-themed content
Rewrote settings with volume/theme controls matching code
Rewrote stats with gravity-game stat fields
Rewrote help with correct gravity well controls
10 new campaign levels (21-30) with advanced layouts

features_completed: Star collection and black hole hazards
